born-red HOLD: this PR ADDS a session card that declares an in-progress/drafted Status — the gate holds the merge red until the card flips complete (designed hold, not a defect). Without this hold a card-only born-red PR with auto-merge pre-armed merges the instant CI reports (superbot-games #40 merged in 24 s on exactly this).

⚑ needs-owner carries asks without the OWNER-ACTION fields (missing: WHERE, HOW, UNBLOCKS) — the owner is the scarcest resource: structure each ask per control/README.md § OWNER-ACTION format (attempt it yourself or cite the exact wall — VERIFIED-NEEDED; assumption-based asks are banned), and withdraw stale asks.
